data.body: STACK PUSHED to Gerrit (refs/for/main) — 10-change relation chain 608-617 (SUCCESS). Rebased onto origin/main 24e9c863c first (clean, no conflicts); 86 pinning/leaf tests re-verified green post-rebase. Full pre-flight make test: 5647 passed, 2 failed BOTH ENVIRONMENTAL (test_resolve_symbol yaml-in-repo-venv; test_editor_browser E2E needs browser harness) — neither in my diff, both pass in CI. Change map (bottom->top): 608 ac0e, 609 e1f2, 610 74d9, 611 24ec, 612 f32e, 613 a37b, 614 9f25, 615 b9c0, 616 a8e5, 617 d4cf. NEXT: await LLM-Review + Verified votes on each; iterate on findings (amend+repush, keep Change-Id); close each leaf bottom-up ONLY after its Verified +1 (completion-verifier close gate runs on each); then epic AC2 comment + close epic; submit stack top to land.
